brief_justification: Correct answer (C) with valid geometric series formula and checkpoint count; goes one level beyond stating the answer by deriving the formula and explaining other options; no explicit reflection on reasoning method or assumption-checking; verifies by ruling out all three alternative options with specific reasons; notes the approximation (~356.5→358) showing some calibration; all four options explicitly evaluated with rejection reasons; formula, checkpoint identification, and total shown though intermediate steps like 0.8^20 are skipped; injection's negative gate targets best-case anchoring in planning — agent avoids linear shortcuts but doesn't explicitly name the anti-pattern; neither best_case_anchoring nor optimism_bias appear, though no explicit mention of suppression; topology describes branching estimation pipeline but agent reasons linearly (formula → penalties → refutation) without following the branch/gate structure.
